title: Optimized technic!
body: Optimized Technic is a modpack designed for players who want a complex and technical Minecraft experience without sacrificing game performance. This pack combines the best of tech mods with key optimizations to ensure smooth gameplay, even on lower-spec computers. Perfect for those who enjoy automating processes, building factories, and developing advanced infrastructure, Optimized Technic allows you to explore the full technological potential of Minecraft without the usual lag or FPS drops.
